content.en:
The years passed.

Ye Tian gradually found 10,000 pieces of ruin god gold in the Thousand Caves Snake Domain.

These Innocent Demon Snakes didn't know the value of the Ruin God Gold at all, and they couldn't use the Ruin God Gold.

To them, the Ruin God Gold is nothing more than toughness, and it can't improve their strength, at most they regard it as a beautiful stone.

This is also the reason why Ye Tian can easily find so much Ruin God Gold and does not need to compete.

Otherwise, he wouldn't be able to easily take the Ruin God Gold from the other Unsullied Demon Serpents.

......

Beyond the Innocent Abyss.

Ye Tian probed into the Innocent Abyss with one hand, and the Innocent Demon Snake spit out a large amount of Ruin God Gold and other treasures, which were grabbed by him with one hand, and then quickly left here.

And Ye Tian's Innocent Demon Snake copy body continues to look for the Ruin God Gold here, although the number of Ruin God Gold here is much less, but at least the Ruin God Gold can still be found, so naturally he can't give up here.

Innocent Island.

Ye Tian came to Xuanyin Pavilion again.

This time, he directly found one of the persons in charge of this Xuanyin Pavilion, that is, the other side level genius of the Origin Middle Realm, the Lord of Hahn.

The strength of this Lord of Hahn is very strong, and he should be the top Origin Middle Realm Heavenly Ancestor, otherwise he would not be able to take charge of this division.

"Is there any important deal with me, this friend?"

The Lord of Hahn asked.

Then.

Ye Tian took out some ruin god gold, the amount was not much, it was only about a hundred.

But.

The Lord of Hahn showed interest.

Xuanyin Pavilion is also short of ruin god gold, and it has been acquiring it, who doesn't want more of this kind of good thing?

"Lord of Hahn, there should be a lot of eternal gold and copper in other branches of Xuanyin Pavilion, I want to exchange the ruin god gold for eternal gold and copper, there is no problem, right?" Ye Tian proposed.

Exchange the ruin god gold for eternal gold and bronze?

The Lord of Hahn stared at Ye Tian with a puzzled expression, he suspected that Ye Tian was a fool.

Ruin God Gold is so rare, and although Eternal Gold and Copper are relatively scarce, there are still a lot of them in the central part, and they can be traded with a little time.

"Naturally, there is no problem!"

The Lord of Hahn immediately agreed.

He would be a fool if he didn't agree to such a good thing.

The next step was the issue of the exchange ratio, which was discussed after some discussion.

Ye Tian could exchange one piece of ruin god gold for ten square eternal gold and copper, and he directly exchanged one hundred pieces of ruin god gold for one thousand square eternal gold and copper.

However, the Lord of Hahn needs to transfer these Eternal Gold and Bronze from other branches, and it will take time.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian was waiting on the Innocent Island.

Not long after, the Lord of Hahn informed Ye Tian that the Xuanyin Pavilion had mobilized a thousand square meters of eternal gold and bronze.

He immediately went over to trade with Xuanyin Pavilion, and traded a hundred pieces of ruin god gold for a thousand square meters of eternal gold and copper.

In fact, the actual value of a thousand square meters of eternal gold and copper is far higher than that of a hundred pieces of ruin god gold.

However, the ruin god gold is rare, and if you want to trade the ruin god gold, you have to buy it at a premium, otherwise you can't buy it.

As a result, the actual transaction value of the Ruin God Gold is much, much higher than the market price and the value of the treasure itself.

......

"The Ruin God Gold is more than enough now, the Eternal Gold and Bronze have also been gathered, and the other materials have been purchased, and now the Eternal Ruin God Array can be built. "

Ye Tian returned to Fengya Island.

Then, he began to build the Eternal Ruins Divine Array.

Little by little, time passed.

Finally.

After the construction of the Eternal Ruins Divine Array is completed, he only needs to open it, and he can use the Eternal Ruins Divine Array to enter the interior of the Origin of the Land on the Other Side of Eternity, so as to comprehend the more powerful Origin Rules of the Other Shore.

"Turn on!"

The Eternal Ruins Divine Array opened, and the terrifying power of the formation directly tore apart the origin of the land on the other side of eternity, sending Ye Tian into the origin of the land on the other side of eternity, and opening up a small void inside it, allowing Ye Tian to be there to comprehend the origin.

This was also the first time that Ye Tian had entered the interior of the Origin of the Land on the Other Side of Eternity.

And the activation of the Eternal Ruins Divine Array, the movement was too big, and all the Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors in the entire Wind Tooth Island sensed it and came over one after another.

Even the Lord of Ice and Rain from the Origin Upper Realm has arrived.

Whew!!

The Lord of Qingyun also came, and when he saw the Lord of Ice and Rain, he said hello.

"Lord of Ice and Rain!"

The Lord of Qingyun said respectfully.

The Lord of Ice Rain also nodded slightly, and immediately looked at Ye Tian's residence.

"This is the residence of the Endless Lord, and this formation is the Eternal Ruins God Formation!!!"

The Lord of Ice and Rain was surprised.

The Lord of Qingyun said: "Lord of Ice and Rain, the Lord of Endless has consulted me before, and his Origin Rules on the Other Shore have progressed rapidly, and he has reached the Forty Percent Nine Realm, and I told him that the Eternal Ruins Divine Array can help him enter the Origin of the Land on the Other Side of Eternity. But I never expected that he would really gather the materials!"

"The Eternal Ruin Divine Array requires ten thousand pieces of Ruin God Gold, and thousands of Eternal Gold and Copper and other materials. Even if you go to the central part of the country to run a few more places, you can still buy it. But the ruin god gold, no matter where you go, you can't buy it, this is not for sale, only buy. Endless Lord, where did you get so much ruin god gold???" The Lord of Ice and Rain wondered.

"I don't know. "

The Lord of Qingyun shook his head.

The Lord of Ice and Rain couldn't figure it out, Ye Tian had gotten a lot of high-grade Eternal Ancient Gold and built the Eternal Origin Array, and she was very surprised.

But this time, Ye Tian obtained so much ruin god gold, which was even more surprising.

He even suspected that Ye Tian was the heir of a top-notch Origin Upper Realm, but if that was the case, there was no need to send him to Fengya Island!

"Let's go, the Lord of Endless is now contemplating and cultivating within the Origin of the Land on the Other Side of Eternity, and he can't sense the situation in the outside world. "

The Lord of Ice and Rain left, and the Lord of Qingyun also returned.

The other Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors were amazed, discussed for a while, and left one by one.

......

The land beyond eternity, within the source.

Ye Tian came to his senses here and gradually immersed himself in it.

Gradually, he felt a deeper level of the original rules of the other side, and the aspects that he didn't understand before were now realized one by one.

Soon.

He broke the bottleneck of the rules, and the realm of the original rules on the other side successfully stepped into the realm of fifty percent, and it continued to improve.

One primeval epoch after another has passed.

After about a hundred primeval eras, this Eternal Ruins Divine Array began to tremble.

It's time!

"The Eternal Ruins Divine Array can only last for more than a hundred primeval eras!"

It is not surprising that Ye Tian understands this.

Click!

The Eternal Ruins Divine Array began to collapse, and Ye Tian had already returned.

In a short time, the Eternal Ruins God was completely scrapped.

But Ye Tian felt that this cultivation was worth it, because he had improved too much!~
